jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at IndiGo
jsonLd.description:
IndiGo is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IndiGo:
IndiGo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
